Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John R. Browne, III, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John B. Urbahns, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Joseph L. Barnes Construction Col, Inc., a California corporation, Norman A. Barnes or Jeannette A. Barnes.
Defaults were entered against defendants on November 12, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 31, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 26, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff John B. Urbahns, and against the Defaulted Defendants Joseph L. Barnes Construction Co., Inc., a California corporation, Norman A. Barnes and Jeannette A. Barnes as follows:

Damages/Principal - $312,052.05.
Prejudgment Interest - $72,120.77.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived, for a total judgment in the amount of $72,120.77.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
